cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer holding a treat and luring a dog in a circle, dog following the treat with its nose, starting the spinning motion, indoor setting, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Top-down camera angle showing the circular motion of the dog following the treat

cenas.dalle_prompt: Dog completing a full 360-degree spin, trainer giving the treat and praise, successful completion of the lured spin, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow-motion as the dog completes the spin, with a trail effect to emphasize the circular motion

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer making a circular hand gesture (without a treat) and saying 'Gira', dog performing the spin, showing the transition to the hand signal, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, focusing on the hand signal and the dog's immediate response

cenas.dalle_prompt: Dog performing the 'Gira' trick in both directions, clockwise and counter-clockwise, demonstrating advanced control, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Split screen showing the dog spinning in both directions simultaneously

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog in the middle of a graceful spin, with motion blur and a celebratory background, text overlay 'Giro Perfeito!', 8k quality
